/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/new_crawler.dir/main.cpp.o -o new_crawler  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libmongocxx1.4.4.0.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libbsoncxx1.4.4.0.dylib
